prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为3854→3341→4125→3143→3279名，整体呈波动走势，近两年在3100–3300区间窄幅震荡；2025年基准位次约327 9名；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年为20人，2022–2025年均为18人，2026年仍为18人，计划人数连续5年持平，无扩招或缩 招信号，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳步提升，2021年第62名→2024年第68名→2025年第63名→2026 年第57名，排名持续上升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合，2026年无直接负面舆情记录；抖音热度总排名第7（ 高热），综合热度739万，短视频平台曝光量大，张雪峰等升学规划师多次推荐该校为\"性价比很高的211\"，报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术获评A，化学A- ，材料科学与工程A-，三个学科均为A-及以上，在化工、材料领域实力突出；招生专业中的工科试验班（先进材料、绿色化工与生物医药、高端装备与智能制造）均与优势学科直 接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科大类社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校工科试验班培养方向契合；生 化环材类虽整体劝退，但该校化工、材料学科评估高，专业壁垒较强；青海省2026年物理类考生约30672人（按历史比例估算），较2025年30457人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；该校位于北京市，属一线城市，对青海考生有较强地域吸引力；学校信息显示为\"理工类、公办\"，在京211高校中录取位次相对适中，性价比较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在3100–3300区间窄幅波动、招生计划连续持平、学校软科排名稳步上升至第57位、抖音高热关注度、青海物理类考生小幅增加等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025 年略有加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低录取位次约3249名，区间2749–3749名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）（包含机械设计制造及其自动化、过程装备与控制工程、机器人工程）
- 理科试验班（物理电科类）（包含电子科学与技术、应用物理学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）（包含高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
- 工科试验班（化工与能源）（包含化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程、氢能科学与工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（大数据与智能管理）（包含信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用）
- 理科试验班（数学统计类）（包含应用统计学、数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2749–3749名内，建议以二档工科试验班（先进材料/化工与能源）为主力填报，利用学校A-/A级学科优势；一档高端装备与智能制造及理科试验班（物理电科类 ）可作为冲刺志愿；三档大数据与智能管理及数学统计类作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如2700名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai Science (Physics Category) were 3854 → 3341 → 4125 → 3143 → 3279, showing a fluctuating trend, with narrow fluctuations in the 3100–3300 range in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3279. The enrollment plan for this university in Qinghai Province for Science (Physics Category) was 20 in 2021, 18 from 2022 to 2025, and remains 18 in 2026, with the planned number remaining unchanged for five consecutive years, indicating no expansion or contraction signals, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily improved in recent years, from 62nd in 2021 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, with a continuous upward trend, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2024 was neutral/mixed, with no direct negative public opinion records in 2026; Douyin heat total ranking 7th (high heat), comprehensive heat 7.39 million, with high exposure on short video platforms; Zhang Xuefeng and other study planning experts have repeatedly recommended this university as a "211 with high cost-performance ratio," leading to high application attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with three disciplines all at A- or above, demonstrating outstanding strength in chemical and materials fields; the engineering experimental classes (Advanced Materials, Green Chemical and Biomedical, High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) in the admission majors directly correspond to the advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended with social heat, aligning with the training direction of the university's engineering experimental classes; although the biochemistry and environmental materials category is generally discouraged, the university's chemical and materials disciplines have high evaluations and strong professional barriers; the number of Physics Category candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 30,672 (estimated based on historical proportions), slightly increasing from 30,457 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition; the university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Qinghai candidates; the university information shows "Science and Engineering, Public," with relatively moderate admission rankings among Beijing 211 universities, offering high cost-performance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 3100–3300 range, the continuous flat enrollment plan, the steady rise of the university's Soft Science ranking to 57th, high Douyin heat attention, and a slight increase in Qinghai Physics Category candidates, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 3249, with a range of 2749–3749.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Robot Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Electronics) (including Electronic Science and Technology, Applied Physics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials) (including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical and Energy) (including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Big Data and Intelligent Management) (including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Statistics) (including Applied Statistics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2749–3749, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Advanced Materials/Chemical and Energy), leveraging the university's A-/A level discipline advantages; Tier 1 High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing and Science Experimental Class (Physics and Electronics) can be used as ambitious choices; Tier 3 Big Data and Intelligent Management and Mathematics and Statistics can serve as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2700), focus on ambitious applications for Tier 1 majors.
